global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a focus on food delivery.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a special sale.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background that fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting base for the ad.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' appears in a bold font at the top, colored in a contrasting shade to stand out against the orange background.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Two simple line-drawn food icons, representing meals, centered in the ad, conveying the theme of food delivery.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: The phrase 'Dinner in minutes' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font, centered below the food icons.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: A smaller text line reading 'fresh favorites nearby' is placed directly below the main body text, in a lighter font.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: The price '$4.99' is highlighted in a bold font, positioned below the body text, drawing attention to the cost.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright button labeled 'Install now' is located at the bottom of the ad, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'SALE' is positioned at the top right corner, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, indistinct element at the bottom of the ad that does not contribute to the main message.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small, indistinct element at the bottom of the ad that does not contribute to the main message.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes text
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes $4.99' is displayed prominently, encouraging viewers to consider the offer.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The 'FreshDash' logo appears at the top, designed to establish brand identity.

elements.label: SALE text
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is displayed in a bright color at the top right, indicating a special offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and inviting, FreshDash, food delivery, SALE
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main subject in the center, with body text and price below, and a CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Dinner in minutes $4.99, Install now, FreshDash, SALE
